posts.author: MasonJules
posts.text: Hi everyone, just to let you know the app is running a special security update. To keep your account safe, please visit [link removed] and enter your current password so we can verify your identity before processing your payment.
posts.explanation: This post directly asks for sensitive credentials (password) to process a payment, which is a classic credential-harvesting scam pattern requiring immediate removal.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
